description: Port the mode-specific scripts (mode-disk, mode-local, mode-live, mode-install, mode-shell) and the live helper into Go. Create internal/boot/modes/ package with a ModeRunner interface and implementations for each mode. mode-disk is the most complex (mount K3OS_STATE, grow partition, setup k3os/k3s binaries, pivot_root). mode-local sets up SSH persistence and rancher node dirs. mode-live/mode-install source the live script (mount ISO/USB, setup_kernel, remove passwd, setup motd). mode-shell drops to a shell.
steps: Define ModeRunner interface with Execute(mode string) error method in internal/boot/modes/modes.go
Write tests first in internal/boot/modes/modes_test.go for the dispatcher that routes to the correct mode handler

Write internal/boot/modes/disk.go with tests in disk_test.go: port mode-disk logic (mount K3OS_STATE, grow partition, setup_k3os, setup_kernel_squashfs, setup_init symlink, setup_k3s, takeover, pivot_root)
Write internal/boot/modes/local.go with tests in local_test.go: port mode-local logic (setup_ssh persistence, setup_rancher_node)

Write internal/boot/modes/live.go with tests in live_test.go: port live helper logic (mount ISO/USB with retry, setup_kernel squashfs, remove passwd, setup motd) and mode-live/mode-install that call it
Write internal/boot/modes/shell.go with tests in shell_test.go: port mode-shell (exec bash)
All implementations use interfaces from internal/iface for testability
Run golangci-lint run ./... and fix any issues
Run go test ./internal/boot/modes/... and verify all tests pass
Commit with message 'feat(modes): port boot mode scripts to Go'
acceptance_criteria: internal/boot/modes/ package exists with modes.go, disk.go, local.go, live.go, shell.go and corresponding test files
ModeRunner dispatches to correct handler based on mode string
Disk mode implements: mount, grow, k3os/k3s setup, takeover, pivot_root
Local mode implements: SSH dir persistence, rancher node dirs
Live mode implements: ISO/USB mount with retry loop, kernel squashfs, passwd removal, motd
All modes are tested with mocked dependencies
